textByHash.012d50b7d523848d280fd64ad3c0852d90a4b703: Well, what proof of friendship did you bring?
textByHash.061983234411cd2af979bf2fcd45021d7df00408: Until then, back to whence you came!
textByHash.0fce283088650346014a1ce2939b5210b41b1257: That's what I said, like it or lump it.
textByHash.173945c49197be1cad7ee5faeb65d20db51d5c9d: Prove it to us with a gift. Get us something from the market.
textByHash.1fa0310da07f952c3d9071fc9953775ec695759e: Oi! Where do you think you are going? You are for the cooking pot!
textByHash.3cbae472138e7a3200dc8984094e5a7d173e490c: What do you want, small thing? Leave us alone!
textByHash.531c3716b2cff6564074aac919c166b37c556845: It's brought it! On your way.
textByHash.581a8daa2bf56e77ea74998229b67cac2d8dc34f: Stop, creature! Only ogres and their friends allowed in this city. Show me a sign of companionship, like a lost relic or somefing, and you may pass.
textByHash.64a77e06222f459083353134e6c39aece2601122: No gold, no passage. Get out of this city!
textByHash.6e67afecb1fe0d95448a84c8c7ab238f5ae63cd3: And where is your money? Grrrr! Do you want to get hurt or something?
textByHash.7910157d6b641d38567041923f59c82ac78cf454: Oi! Little thing. If you want to cross here, you must pay me 20 gold pieces first!
textByHash.8f7ac044f8ba0e88a94713ded54247a0accf5895: We's grabbed da closes dead-uns to stop da zogries gettin' em..de'se dead-uns coffins got da old-uns boneses and older-stuff in 'em, Grish seys we's needs to guard 'em...I's does what Grish seys.
textByHash.90162b52aafe537e88020e5ad89a6ed654c5da86: Ok, I opens da stoppa's for yous creature.
textByHash.955f8103afe26270962bfb617443ef7c09051e01: Me's was born angry....me's wantin' to dead many peples...is what ogries meant to do...
textByHash.970f810556a4979ff7de8da5a3a18d2dbf6b071b: You didn't bring anything! Shove off!
textByHash.a21b4fe38504d2a5b6feb83b040b5223629c79ca: Creature, did you bring me the gold?
textByHash.b22161fdb6d32c62a77cc613a9d36040d92f9e80: You can help by being tonight's dinner, or you can go away. Now, which shall it be?
textByHash.b7368a9a245d4d23f3ac78ab443b07d4489a4220: Da Zogries comes from da deadies place - deys attacking all da jig-dancers wot do da god stuff... jiggin an all. Dem zogries gonna dead all on us wiv da sickies.
textByHash.b7f23ce24050a249d319da475cf88205dbde5401: Ok, dat is da big, big scary, danger fing! You's sure you's wants to go in?
textByHash.bbf0e2d854c3db00dedb2a0024aa802aa52bab0a: In that case you're not crossing.
textByHash.c506facc9b4e080a08cef256f87e577da5d7848c: Yous needs ta stay away from dis place...yous get da sickies and mebe yous goes to dead if yous da unlucky fing.
textByHash.c531bb9e46515249e3bd42ea1c9478a2eb0190fa: Hey yous tryin' not to get da sickies else yous be da sick-un and mebe get to be a dead-un if yous be da unlucky fing.
textByHash.d8d4af7d573556f34b9dc3a660c9c273a680e02d: I's is guardin' da coffins-ies- make sure no fieves nick stuff from 'em. If dey's do, dey get's bashed and shoved down da big 'ole and get deaded by da zogries in da deadies place. So yous creature be wares...ok!
textByHash.daba82ac58c02a2be3fa3720b87a34cbe621c998: Well, well, look at this. My favourite: rock cake! Okay, we will let it through.
textByHash.dcf81b5e944cdcb0fd2a774885e840e091587300: Stop, creature! Oh it's you. Well, what have you got for us, then?
textByHash.dfbf41317dfa06db4f76670377a46e4fcde9b0c2: It's got the statue of Dalgroth. Welcome to Gu'Tanoth, friend of the ogres.
textByHash.ef8247e232eca83d4462a6e6497e7341aab68fd1: You will be my friend only with gold. Bring me a bar of pure gold and I will let you pass.
